name: Automated Sentry Grid
reasoning: V3 best fulfills the prompt requirements with excellent composition and prompt adherence. It features a luminous geometric energy grid with crystalline nodes, trapped mechanical constructs clearly visible within the field, cascading arcs of ethereal light, and weathered stone architecture (towers/ruins) in the background. The cool steel-blue and teal palette with screen-glow lighting is perfect for the blue color identity, and the post-apocalyptic setting is strongly conveyed. V1 lacks mechanical constructs and architectural backdrop, while V2 shows only a single construct in a simplified geometric frame without the intricate lattice or ruins.

artifacts_found.issue: Missing mechanical constructs trapped in the grid and lacks weathered stone architecture backdrop
Overly simplified geometric design with only one construct; lacks intricate lattice network and architectural ruins
